home.heroDesc: Want to ask friends, colleagues or the community for their opinions? Create a poll in seconds and get instant results effortlessly.
home.featTitle: Simple polls with powerful configuration capabilities.
home.featDesc: Although we designed our polls to be as simple and beautiful as possible, we also provide powerful customization options to allow tailoring to specific requirements for various purposes.
home.f1Desc: Strong security mechanisms. Automatically switches between Light and Dark mode for an optimal experience.
home.f2Desc: Every change from votes to comments is updated instantly without needing to reload the page.
home.f3Desc: Supports multiple choices, allowing you to set deadlines and creator anonymity depending on the use case.
home.f4Desc: Comment and discuss directly on each poll. Smooth interaction like top social networks.
home.f5Desc: Survey results are aggregated and displayed visually through percentages and vibrant highlight colors.
home.f6Desc: Secure login system, password recovery via email OTP with absolute identity protection design.
home.createSectionTitle: Use our advanced poll creation tool
home.createSectionDesc: Unlimited customization from multiple choices, deadline setup to anonymous voting. Our tool is designed for maximum convenience and suits any opinion-gathering scenario.
home.voteSectionDesc: No need to refresh the page! Every vote is updated in real-time. You can see the progress bars flash and numbers jump the exact moment someone votes halfway across the globe.
home.commentSectionDesc: Each poll comes with a mini forum. You can leave opinions, participate in threaded replies, interact freely with a real identity or comment entirely anonymously. Everyone has a voice.

dashboard.subtitle: Discover and vote on community discussions

pollDetail.noComments: No comments yet. Be the first!

forgotPassword.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email (e.g., name@gmail.com)
forgotPassword.otpSent: OTP has been sent to your email. Check your inbox and use the code to reset your password.
forgotPassword.failedToSendCheckEmail: Failed to send OTP. Please check the email address.
forgotPassword.title: Forgot Password?
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter your registered email and we'll send you an OTP to reset your password.
forgotPassword.rightDesc: Your data is safe. We use high-tier OTP validation to ensure only you can regain access to your critical assets.

resetPassword.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 6 characters
resetPassword.resetSuccess: Password reset successfully! Redirecting to login...
resetPassword.invalidOtp: Invalid or expired OTP. Please try again.
resetPassword.otpResent: OTP has been re-sent to your email.
resetPassword.title: Reset Password
resetPassword.subtitle: Enter the OTP sent to your email and create a new password.

auth.heroDesc: Join millions of users who rely on our enterprise-grade security to manage and participate in critical consensus events globally.

createPoll.title: Create New Poll

createPoll.tagsPlaceholder: Type a tag and press Enter (e.g. Tech, Fun)
createPoll.anonymousDesc: Post anonymously. Others won't see you as the creator.

profile.noPollsDesc: Create your first poll to start gathering community votes.
profile.noVotesDesc: Explore polls and cast your first vote!
profile.noCommentsDesc: Share your thoughts on community polls!
profile.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this poll?

termsPage.title: Terms of Service
termsPage.s1Desc: By accessing or using SystemVoting ("the Service"), you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree to these terms, please do not use our Service.
termsPage.s2Desc: SystemVoting provides an online platform for creating, managing, and participating in polls and surveys. The Service allows users to vote, comment, and engage with community-driven decision-making.
termsPage.s3Desc: You must register for an account to access certain features. You agree to provide accurate information and maintain the security of your credentials. You are responsible for all activities under your account.
termsPage.s4Desc: You agree not to use the Service to: create fraudulent or misleading polls; harass other users; spread malware; violate applicable laws; or interfere with the Service's operation. We reserve the right to suspend or terminate accounts that violate these terms.
termsPage.s5Desc: The Service, including its design, logos, and content (excluding user-generated content), is owned by SystemVoting. You retain ownership of content you create but grant us a license to display and operate it within the Service.
termsPage.s6Desc: The Service is provided "as is." We are not liable for any indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from your use of the Service. Our total liability shall not exceed the amount you paid us (if any) in the past twelve months.
termsPage.s7Desc: We may update these Terms from time to time. We will notify users of material changes via email or in-app notice. Continued use after changes constitutes acceptance of the new Terms.
termsPage.s8Desc: For questions about these Terms, please contact us through the support channels provided in the Service.

privacyPage.title: Privacy Policy
privacyPage.s1Desc: We collect information you provide directly: username, email address, password (hashed), profile avatar, and any content you create (polls, votes, comments). We may also collect usage data such as IP address, browser type, and access timestamps.
privacyPage.s2Desc: We use your information to provide, maintain, and improve the Service; authenticate your identity; send verification emails and password reset links; display your profile and activity; and comply with legal obligations.
privacyPage.s3Desc: We do not sell your personal data. We may share data with service providers (e.g., hosting, email) under confidentiality agreements. We may disclose information if required by law or to protect our rights and safety.
privacyPage.s4Desc: We use session tokens and refresh tokens for authentication. These are stored securely and allow you to stay logged in. You can clear them by signing out. We do not use third-party advertising cookies.
privacyPage.s5Desc: We retain your account data for as long as your account is active. You may request deletion of your account and associated data. Some data may be retained for backup or legal compliance.
privacyPage.s6Desc: We implement industry-standard security measures including encryption, secure passwords, and access controls. While we strive to protect your data, no system is 100% secure.
privacyPage.s7Desc: Depending on your location, you may have rights to access, correct, or delete your data; object to processing; or data portability. Contact us to exercise these rights.
privacyPage.s8Desc: For privacy-related questions or requests, please contact us through the support channels provided in the Service.

footer.addressValue: 99 Nguyen Chi Thanh, Dong Da, Hanoi
